description: A classic-style dresser with an ornate design, featuring a top surface, a decorative molding along the top edge, and a stepped base with carved detailing. It has two small drawers at the top, each with a triangular inlay and a curved handle, followed by four larger drawers stacked vertically, all with similar curved handles. The dresser is supported by four decorative, turned legs and is finished with a carved floral and leaf motif between the front legs.
